title: Fire God applies two-cycle damage over time

card.rawText: When this creature hits, the target creature receives 10 damage once per turn cycle, for 2 turn cycles.

plan.title: Fire God applies two-cycle damage over time
plan.summary: Fire God lands a hit and applies recurring 10 damage to the target for two turn cycles without stacking.

notes: Set Fire God as player_1 primary.
Set player_2 primary to a 100 HP defender.
Advance combat/end phases enough to observe recurring damage.

steps: Player 1 attacks and hits with Fire God.
Resolve the ON_HIT recurring damage application.
Advance through combat/end timing to tick damage.
Inspect recurring damage events and target HP.
manualVerification: Confirm the recurring damage expires after two turn cycles and does not stack.
riskNotes: Turn-cycle expiry is broader than this single fixture's event assertion.

runnerNotes: Create a dev match from plan.setup, execute plan.steps, then verify plan.expectedAssertions.
The LLM only proposes the fixture. The deterministic engine and manual QA status remain source of truth.
